name: Roasted Red Pepper Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered food processor container, process the bread until crumbly; set aside.
2. Add the roasted red sweet peppers, garlic, and salt to the container.
3. Cover and process until smooth.
4. With the processor running, gradually add olive oil through the feed tube.
5. Add the reserved bread crumbs; cover and process until smooth.
6. Transfer the mixture to a small bowl or ramekin.
7. Serve chilled or at room temperature with crackers or toasted bread. Yields about 1 cup.
Note: To roast your own peppers, cut the peppers in half lengthwise. Remove seeds. Place the pepper halves, cut side down, on a foil-lined baking sheet. Bake uncovered in a 425°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the skin is bubbly and brown. Place the peppers in a clean paper bag; seal and let stand for 20 to 30 minutes, or until cool enough to handle. Gently pull off the skin using a paring knife.
